full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19592

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19592.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
keepalived-2.2.8-5.el9_6.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
keepalived-2.2.8-5.el9_6.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/keepalived-2.2.8-5.el9_6.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.2.8-5]
- lvs: if lost misc check child register checker again
  Resolves: RHEL-81944
